texto: If there comes a little thaw Still the air is chill and raw Here and there a patch of snow Dirtier than the ground below Dribbles down a marshy flood Ankle-deep you stick in mud In the meadows while you sing "This is Spring."
explicacao: Citação de C. P. Cranch sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “If there comes a little thaw Still the air is chill and raw Here and there a patch of snow Dirtie…” articula reflexao, spring, there em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
